---
title: "Lecture Downloads"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: false
---

# Lecture Downloads

Each lecture deck is available as a PDF handout, a rendered HTML slide deck, and editable Quarto source.

PDFs are the easiest format for students to download, print, annotate, and keep offline. The HTML files preserve the interactive slide format. The `.qmd` files are intended for instructors who want to revise, remix, or export the decks in another format.

<table>
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th>Module</th>
      <th>Topic</th>
      <th>Downloads</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr><td>1</td><td>What AI Changes</td><td><a href="lectures/module01.pdf" download>PDF</a> | <a href="lectures/module01.html" download>HTML slides</a> | <a href="lectures/module01.qmd" download>Quarto source</a></td></tr>
    <tr><td>2</td><td>Prompting as Communication</td><td><a href="lectures/module02.pdf" download>PDF</a> | <a href="lectures/module02.html" download>HTML slides</a> | <a href="lectures/module02.qmd" download>Quarto source</a></td></tr>
    <tr><td>3</td><td>The 70 Percent Problem</td><td><a href="lectures/module03.pdf" download>PDF</a> | <a href="lectures/module03.html" download>HTML slides</a> | <a href="lectures/module03.qmd" download>Quarto source</a></td></tr>
    <tr><td>4</td><td>Human Contribution Beyond AI</td><td><a href="lectures/module04.pdf" download>PDF</a> | <a href="lectures/module04.html" download>HTML slides</a> | <a href="lectures/module04.qmd" download>Quarto source</a></td></tr>
    <tr><td>5</td><td>Reviewing and Testing AI Code</td><td><a href="lectures/module05.pdf" download>PDF</a> | <a href="lectures/module05.html" download>HTML slides</a> | <a href="lectures/module05.qmd" download>Quarto source</a></td></tr>
    <tr><td>6</td><td>Prototyping vs Production</td><td><a href="lectures/module06.pdf" download>PDF</a> | <a href="lectures/module06.html" download>HTML slides</a> | <a href="lectures/module06.qmd" download>Quarto source</a></td></tr>
    <tr><td>7</td><td>Building AI Systems</td><td><a href="lectures/module07.pdf" download>PDF</a> | <a href="lectures/module07.html" download>HTML slides</a> | <a href="lectures/module07.qmd" download>Quarto source</a></td></tr>
    <tr><td>8</td><td>Security and Reliability</td><td><a href="lectures/module08.pdf" download>PDF</a> | <a href="lectures/module08.html" download>HTML slides</a> | <a href="lectures/module08.qmd" download>Quarto source</a></td></tr>
    <tr><td>9</td><td>Ethics and Responsibility</td><td><a href="lectures/module09.pdf" download>PDF</a> | <a href="lectures/module09.html" download>HTML slides</a> | <a href="lectures/module09.qmd" download>Quarto source</a></td></tr>
    <tr><td>10</td><td>Autonomous Agents</td><td><a href="lectures/module10.pdf" download>PDF</a> | <a href="lectures/module10.html" download>HTML slides</a> | <a href="lectures/module10.qmd" download>Quarto source</a></td></tr>
    <tr><td>11</td><td>The Future of AI Engineering</td><td><a href="lectures/module11.pdf" download>PDF</a> | <a href="lectures/module11.html" download>HTML slides</a> | <a href="lectures/module11.qmd" download>Quarto source</a></td></tr>
    <tr><td>12</td><td>Final Project Workbench</td><td><a href="lectures/module12.pdf" download>PDF</a> | <a href="lectures/module12.html" download>HTML slides</a> | <a href="lectures/module12.qmd" download>Quarto source</a></td></tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

## Offline Use

Download the PDF for the module you need, then open it in any PDF reader. The HTML version is best for presenting in a browser. The source files can be edited with Quarto if an instructor wants to customize the slides.
